name: Mansion #22
description: Sa'd al-Dhabih, 'The Lucky One of the Slaughterer,' ruled by Venus in a martial aspect, provides the ruthlessness needed to eliminate threats while making it difficult to form new alliances. Alpha and Beta Capricorni form the slaughterer's asterism, representing the power to cut away what must be eliminated. The artwork captures this decisive cutting power in Venus' shadowy green-bronze palette with sharp, severing geometric patterns representing liberation through necessary endings.

attributes.value: The Lucky One of the Slaughterer
Eliminating enemies, ending bad relationships, cutting ties
